posts.author: ashtondavanzo (ashton@adrenalinattractions.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Once a quote is approved, allow it to be automatically converted into an invoice without duplicating data or re-entering line items.

What are you trying to achieve

Streamline billing by eliminating manual steps between quote approval and invoicing.
